steps.title: Use the limits signal
steps.content: The underlined portion follows the phrase "This approach has some limits." It explains that Places API data tend to cover customer-facing places, so it names a limitation of the data source.

steps.title: Reject unrelated functions
steps.content:
• Choice A is about neighborhood boundaries, which the underlined portion never discusses.
  • Choice B describes a strength, but the text explicitly signals a limit.
  • Choice C introduces the model, but that happened earlier in the passage.
The remaining choice identifies the underlined text as a specific flaw in the data set. The answer is D.
